title: Hody’s Hatred Is Challenged
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is hody’s hatred is challenged.
scene: The scene follows hody’s hatred is challenged, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's the Princess !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: soldiers ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....Why did you not wait for our arrival...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oh, CRAA AAAAAAAAAAP!! It's the PRINCE EEEES!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are we really gonna be okay?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Fukabosh!! Ryubosh!! Mambosh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must be careful!! The monsters and the fish-man have all been drugged...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As though the Neptune army would be defeated so easily if they did not have some such dirty trick up their sleeves -Re-mi-fa-so!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: You just wait right there, Father ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to Clench their teeth and make an effort to grasp a brighter future...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Your high-ness!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...by offering their signatures in the name of peace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why can you not understand the gentle yet powerful resolve that they have shown?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kquin Ryusuisquisau !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Merfol arms- manshi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shicchin Bampou!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you not understand, Holy Jones ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You and your accomplices are weaker than any citizen of this country !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people of this island had the courage to avert their eyes from the cruel history of oppression our people have suffered...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: to allow even the death of our hero and our queen at the humans' hands to be washed away in the river of time in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: RyUQUU ROUNDAN !!!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: you fools who know nothing but revenge and hatred...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...will not take the king's head! Nor the citizens' homes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you will certainly not take this kingdom!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We will not allow it!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will make you taste defeat!! And forge a future of harmony with humanity!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: If you prevail, then our people will lose all chance of peace with the humans for centuries to come!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: th... they defeated all the sea monsters!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They really are strong!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the princes of our kingdom for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Prattle all you like

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But in the end, this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...belongs only to the victors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HaaA Aaa!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You must hurry, Megalo !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ruoh H!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Father ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please, be safe...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Worry not!! We will prevail!!!

summary: Hody’s Hatred Is Challenged. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
